canonical_terms.FlexSchema: Universal schema library enabling cross-domain type resolution
canonical_terms.FlexGraph: Graph construction from Typed Vector Store (Ephemeral + Persistent)
canonical_terms.CORE: Six universal dimensions (Interrogative, Valence, Abstraction, Epistemic, Temporal, Structural)
canonical_terms.Typed Vector Store: Vector storage with section_type + document properties
canonical_terms.Template-As-Schema: H2/H3 markdown structure providing section_type metadata
canonical_terms.BRAIN: Intelligence layer (FlexGraph, Entity Resolution, Temporal Cortex, Introspection)
canonical_terms.FLEET: Universal Knowledge Gateway (nexus, brain, trace, IMEM)
